column6: Validation plan executed per Impact Level — internal product user sessions (3-5), external representative user sessions (5-8 for Impact 1-2), and customer sessions (Impact 1) completed with findings documented and applied
column7: Validation partially complete — some required sessions not yet conducted; mitigation plan documented with timeline
column8: Required validation has not been performed for this Impact Level

column6: UX and Product Education have reviewed changes in UX Preview production group; both signed off on visual accuracy, interaction quality, and documentation needs
column7: Preview available but one or more sign-offs still pending; issues identified with clear resolution plan
column8: No UX Preview group configured or reviews not started

column6: Baseline Pendo/usage metrics captured for all affected workflows; pre-launch snapshot documented with defined comparison criteria for post-launch analysis
column7: Baseline partially captured — some metrics still being instrumented or historical data gaps identified with workaround plan
column8: No behavioral baseline established for affected workflows

column6: Feature gate implemented and tested; rollback verified in staging with <30 minute recovery time; gate controls validated for all cohort groups (Internal, Cohort 1, Cohort 2)
column7: Feature gate implemented but rollback procedure not yet tested end-to-end; gate configuration documented
column8: No feature gate implemented for an Impact 1-2 change; or gate exists but has not been validated

column6: Rollback plan documented and tested — detection (<15 min), assessment (confirm rollout-related), feature gate disable (<30 min), stakeholder communication (<1 hour); communication template prepared
column7: Rollback plan documented but not yet tested end-to-end; stakeholder communication template in draft
column8: No rollback plan exists or rollback mechanism has not been identified

column6: Pendo guides deployed per Impact Level — full onboarding experience (Impact 1), guided walkthroughs (Impact 2), or contextual guidance (Impact 3); accessibility reviewed; linked to Zendesk articles where applicable
column7: Pendo guides drafted and in review but not yet deployed to production; or accessibility review pending; Zendesk article updates in progress
column8: Required Pendo guides not created; or guides created but fail accessibility or plain-language review; or no education assets for an Impact 1-3 change

column6: All required customer communications sent per Impact Level timeline — advance email (Impact 2: 2-4 weeks; Impact 1: 18+ weeks), CSM strategic account outreach completed (Impact 1), reminder and training resource emails sent
column7: Communication plan exists and is on track but some communications still pending; or minor timeline delays with clear catch-up plan
column8: No customer communication plan for an Impact 1-2 change; or significantly behind required timeline with no mitigation
